title: Bermuda Stripe Pyramid Bag
description: A bold pyramid bag in classic Bermuda-style bold stripe fabric — blue, red, and yellow — with a bright teal zip. A true Bermudian statement piece.

title: Pineapple Diamond Pouch
description: Small diamond-shaped zippered pouch in a vibrant pineapple print on turquoise, with a burgundy zip and a keyring attachment. Shown open and closed — a tropical everyday essential.

title: Hot Air Balloon Diamond Pouch
description: Whimsical diamond-shaped pouch in a hot air balloon and kite print on pale blue, with a purple zip and a vibrant orange interior. Makes a delightful gift.

title: Purple Flower Diamond Pouch
description: Diamond-shaped pouch in soft purple fabric, hand-decorated with handmade fabric flower rosettes in pink, orange, and green. Each one is truly one of a kind.

title: Purple Embroidered Daisy Pouch
description: Flat zip pouch in purple fabric adorned with colourful hand-embroidered daisies in pink, orange, yellow, and green, with a mint green zip. A touch of hand-finished charm.
